serviceIntervals.task: Rear brake pads and discs - park brake drums / shoes

serviceNotes.Engine oil & filter: Toyota New Zealand GR86 (ZN8) service requirements: service by age or km whichever first; engine oil & filter replaced at each ‘A’ interval (15,000 km / 12 months) under normal conditions.
serviceNotes.Cabin air filter: The published GR86 ‘A’ service lists cabin air filter as inspect (¤ dealer may recommend replacement if unable to clean). This entry uses 30,000 km / 24 months as a normal replacement cadence when the schedule does not specify a fixed replace kilometrage for GR86.
serviceNotes.Air filter element: ‘C’ service package (45,000 km / 36 months) includes air filter element replacement on the GR86 normal-condition schedule.
serviceNotes.Spark plugs (Iridium type): ‘D’ service package (90,000 km / 72 months) includes spark plug replacement for GR86; iridium plugs are replaced at the specified kilometres unless the service plan states otherwise.
serviceNotes.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): ‘B’ service (30,000 km / 24 months) includes brake and clutch fluid replacement; the pattern repeats with subsequent B-type services on the published km plan.
serviceNotes.Front brake pads and discs: Inspected at each ‘A’ service (15,000 km / 12 months) under the GR86 normal driving checklist.
serviceNotes.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: Inspected at each ‘A’ service (15,000 km / 12 months) on the same checklist as the front axle.
serviceNotes.Rear diff oil: ‘B’ service (30,000 km / 24 months) includes rear differential oil replacement for GR86.
serviceNotes.Auto transmission fluid: Automatic transmission fluid replacement is listed under the ‘D’ package for GR86 only (90,000 km / 72 months on the published normal-condition table).
serviceNotes.Engine / Heater Coolant: First engine/heater coolant replacement appears under the ‘E’ package at 150,000 km (year 10); Toyota then specifies repeat every 75,000 km / 5 years — this entry records the initial 150,000 km / 120 month event.
serviceNotes.Manual transmission oil: Scheduled ‘A’ services list manual transmission oil as inspect for GR86; preventive oil exchange near 120,000 km is a common recommendation if the oil darkens or after repeated track use.

serviceSources.Engine oil & filter: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — GR86 (ZN8) normal service table: 15,000 km ‘A’ service includes engine oil & filter R.
serviceSources.Cabin air filter: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ service: cabin air filter inspect (¤); 30,000 km / 24 months replacement cadence for normal driving when no fixed replace km is listed for GR86.
serviceSources.Air filter element: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘C’ service (45,000 km): air filter element R.
serviceSources.Spark plugs (Iridium type): https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘D’ service (90,000 km): spark plugs (Iridium type) R.
serviceSources.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘B’ service: brake and clutch fluid (DOT4) R (repeats on subsequent B-type intervals).
serviceSources.Front brake pads and discs: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ service checklist: front brake pads and discs I.
serviceSources.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ service checklist: rear brake pads and discs I.
serviceSources.Auto transmission fluid: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘D’ service: auto transmission fluid — GR86 only R.
serviceSources.Engine / Heater Coolant: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘E’ package at 150,000 km: engine/heater coolant R (then every 75,000 km / 5 years per document).
serviceSources.Manual transmission oil: https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — ‘A’ service: manual transmission oil I for GR86; 120,000 km exchange is preventive workshop guidance when fluid condition warrants it.
